message:
test: add 29 tests for LLM merge functions and hosting platform detection

- llm.rs: 12 new tests covering choose_best_available_model (passthrough,
  fallback), apply_multi_thread_thread_revisions (matching, noop, missing
  thread_id, empty arrays), merge_multi_thread_aggregate (overlay, string
  mentions, object mentions, empty arrays preserve heuristic)
- hosting.rs: 17 new tests covering headers file sections (COOP/COEP,
  sqlite3, CORS, viewer, chunks, attachments), platform detection with
  tempdir fixtures (wrangler.toml → CF, netlify.toml → Netlify, deploy
  script → S3, GitHub workflow → Pages), find_ancestor_path, docs dir
  detection, HostingHint serde roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
